name: Daily Market Intel ETL

# 1. When should this run?
on:
  schedule:
    - cron: "0 8 * * *" # Runs every day at 8:00 AM UTC
  workflow_dispatch: # This line adds a "Run Now" button on GitHub so we can test it!

# 2. What should the robot do?
jobs:
  run-pipeline:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest # GitHub will give us a free, temporary Linux server
    
    steps:
      # Step A: Download your code onto the server
      - name: Checkout Code
        uses: actions/checkout@v3

      # Step B: Install Python on the server
      - name: Set up Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v4
        with:
          python-version: '3.10'

      # Step C: Install your tools
      - name: Install Dependencies
        run: pip install pandas requests

      # Step D: Run your pipeline!
      - name: Run ETL Script
        run: python extract.py
